comment: 62yo male, current 1 pack/day cigarette smoker for 30 years (30 pack-years), no personal cancer diagnosis. IARC 100A Group 1 carcinogen — 17-cancer-site risk cluster (lung dominant, plus UADT, bladder, kidney, pancreas, AML). Engine fires RF-UNIVERSAL-CURRENT-SMOKER-MULTI-CANCER (universal lifestyle flag) → routes to PreventionPlan: (1) structured cessation (combined behavioural + varenicline / bupropion / NRT-combination per USPHS / NICE), (2) USPSTF 2021 LDCT eligibility — patient qualifies (age 50-80, ≥20 pack-y, currently smoking) → annual LDCT recommended. Validates v0.3 universal lifestyle RF + LDCT-eligibility cascade. relevant_diseases=["*"], sidecar documentation only.
